uplink.description: ERS CO2 Lite temperature, humidity, CO2 and battery (VDD)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload built from the ERS CO2 Lite TTN example (temp 22.6, hum 41, co2 776) plus a VDD field (0x07,0x0E,0x10 = 3600 mV). Raw values confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js decodeUplink; normalized expected.data authored here (vdd mV -> battery volts).

uplink.description: ERS CO2 Lite temperature, humidity, CO2 and atmospheric pressure
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload. Pressure type 0x14 raw u32 1013186 -> 1013.186, rounded to 1013.19 hPa (within atmospheric 900-1100). Raw values confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js decodeUplink; normalized expected.data authored here.

uplink.description: ERS CO2 Lite negative temperature with light and motion
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload exercising signed-negative temperature (0x01,0xFF,0x9C = -10.0), light (0x04 -> air.lightIntensity 300 lux) and motion (0x05 count 3 -> action.motion). Raw values confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js decodeUplink; normalized expected.data authored here.
Error vector: an empty byte array has no TLV fields to decode.
